stem: A scatterplot shows a bakery's pastry sales s, in dollars, and the average daily temperature t, in degrees Celsius (°C), on 10 different days. The data points are approximately (5, 220), (8, 235), (10, 245), (12, 250), (15, 265), (18, 280), (20, 295), (22, 305), (25, 320), (28, 330), and a line of best fit is drawn through these points. Which of the following could be an equation of the line of best fit?
rationale: The data has a positive slope of roughly (330 − 220)/(28 − 5) ≈ 4.8 dollars per °C and a y-intercept near 200 dollars. Therefore s = 200 + 4.8t best fits. Choice (a) is correct.
